meta.startDescription: A guided journey to help you find the practitioner that fits your needs.
meta.resultDescription: Review your matching recommendations and choose the best next step.

journey.title: Reach the right practitioner
journey.footer: Answer in simple steps and we will rank better-fit options for you.

specialtyCategory.title: What main area do you need help with?
specialtyCategory.subtitle: Choose the closest main area to start with better accuracy.

specialty.title: Which sub-specialty fits you best?
specialty.subtitle: This choice directly affects recommendation quality.
specialty.selectedCategoryReady: Choose a sub-specialty from your selected main area.
specialty.selectCategoryFirst: Go back one step and choose a main area first.

providerType.title: Which provider type do you prefer?
providerType.subtitle: You can choose one, or keep it open.

language.title: Which language is most comfortable for your session?
language.subtitle: Choose the language you prefer.

sessionMode.title: Which session mode works best for you?
sessionMode.subtitle: Video, audio, or no preference.

urgency.title: How soon do you want support?
urgency.subtitle: This helps us prioritize recommendations.

details.title: Optional extra details
details.subtitle: Add extra preferences to improve ranking.
details.notePlaceholder: Add any detail that can help us understand your needs better.
details.firstTimeYes: This is my first therapy experience
details.instantBooking: Prefer practitioners who support instant booking
details.instantBookingHint: We will increase ranking for practitioners with faster booking readiness.

FLEXIBLE.title: I am flexible
FLEXIBLE.note: Show the strongest matches without urgency pressure.

actions.startAgainNote: Run matching again if your needs changed.
actions.reviewAssessmentsNote: If you need more clarity, start with a short check-in.
actions.openSupportNote: Use support for booking, payment, account, or technical issues.
actions.browseAllNote: You can always compare practitioners manually.

states.submitError: We could not create your matching session right now. Please try again.
states.submitMissingSelections: Complete required choices before viewing results.

loadError.heading: We could not load this matching result right now
loadError.note: Try again, or start a new matching session.

validation.primaryConcernMax: Please keep this note under 200 characters.
validation.budgetOrder: Maximum budget should be equal to or greater than minimum.
validation.providerTypeRequired: Choose a provider type or no preference.

result.title: These practitioners are closest to your current needs
result.note: Results are based on your answers. Review each profile before booking.
result.sessionSaved: You can revisit this result later.
result.nextNote: You can run matching again, open support, or browse directly.

reasons.genderPartial: Gender preference is partially supported in this version

empty.title: No clear recommendation yet
empty.heading: No recommendation snapshot is available right now
empty.note: Try again with broader preferences or browse practitioners directly.
